chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَوْمِ التَّطَوُّعِ فِي السَّفَرِ وَ تَقْدِيمِهِ وَ قَضَائِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 51 – The optional Fast during the journey, and its bring forward, and its making up

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/333)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: حسن - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (16/333)
text: قُلْتُ لِلرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) أُرِيدُ السَّفَرَ فَأَصُومُ لِشَهْرِيَ الَّذِي أُسَافِرُ فِيهِ قَالَ لَا قُلْتُ فَإِذَا قَدِمْتُ أَقْضِيهِ قَالَ لَا كَمَا لَا تَصُومُ كَذَلِكَ لَا تَقْضِي .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Al Marzaban Bin Imran who said,

‘I said to Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>, ‘I intend the travel, so can I Fast in my month in which I travel?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No’. I said, ‘So when I return, do I have to make up for it?’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘No, just as you did not Fast, similar to that, you do not make up for it’.
en.sarwar: 4. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from al-Marzuban ibn ‘Imran who has said the following: “I once asked al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, that I like to travel; can I fast in the month in which I am on a journey? He (the Imam) said, ‘No, you cannot do so.’ ‘Can I complete its Qada’ (compensatory fast) when I come home?’ I asked. He (the Imam) said, ‘No, just as you cannot fast in the same way you cannot carry out its Qada’ (compensatory fast).”’
